pi_items.source: Task description and scripts do not explicitly assign this role or mention it for this specific task, though an IT Director exists in the global environment seed data.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated catalog items injected via API scripts. The expected predefined kits to be created are exactly 'Standard Office Kit', 'Developer Workstation Kit', and 'Executive Mobile Kit', explicitly matching the task instructions and verifier expectations.
